models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    balance = Column(Decimal, default=0)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
models.description: Represents a customer with balance, credit limit.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'), nullable=False)
    amount_total = Column(Decimal, default=0)
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    notes = Column(String)

    # ForeignKey relationship is implicit through customer_id
models.description: Represents an order with a link to the customer, total amount, shipment date, and notes.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
    amount = Column(Decimal, default=0)

    # ForeignKey relationships through order_id and product_id
models.description: Represents an order item with quantity, unit price, and total amount.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
models.description: Represents a product with unit price.
models.name: Product

rules.name: Customer Balance Constraint
rules.description: Ensures that a customer's balance does not exceed their credit limit.
rules.code: Rule.constraint(validate=Customer, as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit, error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: Customer Balance Derivation
rules.description: Calculates customer's balance as the sum of their order amounts for unshipped orders.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Order Amount Total Derivation
rules.description: Calculates order's total amount as the sum of its item amounts.

rules.name: Item Amount Calculation
rules.description: Calculates an item's amount as the product of its quantity and unit price.

rules.name: Item Unit Price Copy
rules.description: Ensures the item's unit price is copied from product unit price.

rules.name: Order Kafka Integration
rules.description: Sends order data to Kafka when shipped.
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None, with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})
